# fastar

{: .warning }
> This package is deprecated. PyPI now publishes newer versions of
> this package for riscv64, and we will no longer maintain this
> package. Please use the version from [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/fastar/) instead.
>
> If you need a specific version between the latest available here
> and the first available on PyPI, please open an
> [Issue](https://gitlab.com/riseproject/python/wheel_builder/-/issues).

- **Source Code:** [https://github.com/DoctorJohn/fastar](https://github.com/DoctorJohn/fastar)
- **Supported versions:**

<details markdown="1" open>
<summary><strong>0.8.0 (latest)</strong></summary>

```bash
pip install fastar --index-url https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/56254198/packages/pypi/simple
```
